hero.title: Contact
hero.label: Contact
hero.intro: Collectors, sellers, traders, and researchers are welcome to get in touch about New York City transportation tokens, related exonumia, undocumented pieces, errors, oddities, counterfeits, or items that may deserve more research.

profile.heading: About the Collector
profile.name: Keith Baron
profile.imageAlt: Reverse of token NY630AP showing Good For One Fare
profile.bio: Independent collector with a particular interest in New York City transportation tokens, undocumented varieties, oddities, and the history connected to everyday transit objects.

sections.title: Buying, Selling, or Trading Tokens
body: I am especially interested in New York City transportation tokens, unlisted or undocumented pieces, errors, oddities, counterfeits, unusual varieties, and related exonumia with useful collector or historical context.
Single pieces, small groups, and larger collections are all welcome.

sections.title: Research and Corrections
body: Corrections, attributions, discoveries, provenance notes, and additional information are always welcome. If you can help identify a token, clarify a variety, or improve a listing, please send the details along.
